mapper.insert: insert into user_points (userPointsId, userId, pointsCount, pointsRule, updateDate) values (#{userPointsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{pointsCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pointsRule,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into user_points
userPointsId,
userId,
pointsCount,
sumPoints,
pointsRule,
updateDate,
#{userPointsId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{pointsCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{sumPoints,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{pointsRule,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update user_points
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
pointsCount = #{pointsCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pointsRule = #{pointsRule,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateDate = #{updateDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where userPointsId = #{userPointsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select up.pointsCount, dm.description, dm.nextLabel as rulePoint, dm.price as ruleMoney, (up.pointsCount div dm.nextLabel)*dm.price as pointMoney, (up.pointsCount div dm.nextLabel)*dm.nextLabel as points from user_points up left join data_map dm on dm.idxLabel = 5 where up.userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_points SET pointsCount=pointsCount+#{jifen} WHERE userId=#{userId}
update user_points set pointsCount=pointsCount+ ifnull(#{point},0), sumPoints=sumPoints+ ifnull(#{point},0), updateDate = now() where userId = #{userId}
mapper.select: select case when dm.nextLabel=0 then 0 when dm.val=0 then 0 else TRUNCATE(ifnull(#{energy}, 0) / (dm.val / dm.nextLabel),0) end from data_map dm where dm.idxLabel = 5
select ckey from constant where cId=2
